name: 3ct Ceramic Dreidels Decor Set - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of tradition to your home with the 3ct Ceramic Dreidels Decor Set - Spritz™. Crafted from ceramic, these multicolored decorative objects are perfect for celebrating Hanukkah. Each piece stands at a height of 3.54 inches, making them an ideal addition to your indoor decor. With three pieces in the set, you can easily create a festive atmosphere that honors the season's spirit.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
